content.title: Welcome to ZARKGaming!\nASA 3x Cluster
content.text:
This is our classic survival experience — designed for players who enjoy the original feel of ARK with only light quality-of-life boosts.

If you’re looking for a slower, more rewarding progression where every tame, build, and resource matters… you’re in the right place.

<RichColor Color="1,1,1,1">Getting Started:</>
• Visit the Rules page for a quick overview of what’s allowed
• Check the Server Hub for maps, rates, and cluster information
• Join our Discord for full rules, support, and community updates

<RichColor Color="1,1,1,1">What to expect on this cluster:</>
• 3x rates — slightly boosted, but still close to vanilla progression
• Survival-focused gameplay — resources and progression still matter
• Long-term base building and tribe development
• Balanced PvE depending on map rules

<RichColor Color="1,1,1,1">Important:</>
This cluster is not a fast-paced or high-rate server. Progress takes time, and that’s intentional — your achievements here are meant to feel earned.

<RichColor Color="1,1,1,1">A note from the team:</>
Play fair, build with purpose, and respect other survivors. This cluster is about long-term survival and community, not rushing to endgame.

Good luck out there… and watch your back.

content.title: <RichColor Color="1,1,1,1">ZARK Gaming Rules</>
content.text:
This is a PvE-focused, family-friendly cluster built around fair survival and community gameplay. Full rules are available on our Discord (link below).

<RichColor Color="1,1,1,1">Core PvE Rules</>
These are the most important rules while playing:
• No player killing, raiding, griefing, or stealing
• No luring wild dinos into other players’ bases
• Respect other players’ builds and space
• Do not block spawns, caves, resources, or travel routes

<RichColor Color="1,1,1,1">Fair Play</>
To keep progression balanced for everyone:
• No cheating, exploits, meshing, or bug abuse
• No handing out end-game gear or high-tier dinos
• Trading is allowed if it is fair and like-for-like
• Do not bypass intended progression systems

<RichColor Color="1,1,1,1">Building Rules</>
• Do not pillar or foundation spam land
• Keep bases reasonable and non-disruptive
• Always build out of rendering distance from another player's base
• Remove abandoned or temporary structures when done

<RichColor Color="1,1,1,1">Admin Notice</>
• Staff decisions are final & rules apply even if not listed here
• Serious issues are handled via Discord tickets

<RichColor Color="1,1,1,1">Important</>
This page is only a quick overview of gameplay expectations.

Full rules are available on our Discord and should be read before long-term play.

content.title: <TextStyle.White>Maps</>
content.text:
This Cluster is currently equipped with transferable 8x Maps:
• Aberration
• Astraeos
• Extinction
• Ragnarok
• Scorched Earth
• The Center
• The Island
• Valguero

content.title: <TextStyle.White>Auto-Decay System</>
content.text:
This cluster has auto-decay timers on all structures and tamed dinosaurs, currently aligned with Ark Official Rules:
• Thatch : 4 days
• Wood & Adobe : 8 Days
• Stone : 12 days
• Metal : 16 days
• Vault: 16 days
• Tek : 20-80 days

content.title: <TextStyle.White>News</>
content.text:
• Scheduled daily restart at 05:00 - 06:00
• See #live-status Discord channel for server status
